subjects.description: An overhead traffic signal mounted across the road on a horizontal mast arm extending from a vertical pole at the right side of the intersection. The signal head is a standard three-lamp vertical configuration in a dark metal housing.
subjects.appearance_details: Black-painted aluminum signal housing with visors above each lamp; the bottom green lamp is illuminated and glowing, the middle amber and top red lamps are dark. Faint reflective backplate edges catch ambient light.
subjects.relationship: The governing traffic control device the ego vehicle reads and obeys as it approaches and crosses the intersection.
subjects.location: Center frame, slightly upper portion, spanning above the road ahead
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (toward oncoming ego vehicle)
subjects.pose: Mounted horizontally on the mast arm, stationary
subjects.state_changes: Remains green and stable throughout; grows slightly larger in frame as the vehicle approaches and passes beneath it.

subjects.description: A normal-sized yellow full moon hanging in the clear night sky directly ahead, positioned just above the amber middle lamp of the overhead signal.
subjects.appearance_details: Pale yellow-gold luminous disc with faint surface mottling, a soft halo, and crisp edges against the deep blue-black sky.
subjects.relationship: A celestial backdrop element positioned near the signal to potentially confuse signal reading, but the ego vehicle remains unbothered.
subjects.location: Upper center frame, just above the traffic signal head
subjects.action: Glowing softly in the night sky
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; stays fixed in the sky while parallax shifts it slightly relative to the signal as the car advances.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car implied by the first-person dashboard-level point of view, driving forward along the road at cruising speed.
subjects.appearance_details: Only the forward view is visible; a faint suggestion of the hood and the spread of headlight beams illuminating the asphalt ahead.
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view subject whose perspective the entire video is shot from.
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road, away from camera
subjects.action: Driving steadily toward and through the intersection
subjects.state_changes: Maintains a constant cruising speed; no braking or swerving as it passes under the green signal.

background_setting: A quiet, multi-lane urban road at night approaching a four-way intersection. The asphalt is dry and clear, lane markings visible in the headlight wash. Curbs, sidewalks, and a few darkened storefronts or low buildings line the road edges, with sparse street lamps casting pools of warm light. The intersection ahead is spanned by an overhead traffic signal on a mast arm. The sky is clear and deep blue-black, dominated by a normal-sized yellow moon just above the signal. No other traffic is present, giving an open, empty road.

lighting.conditions: Clear night, low ambient light with moonlight and vehicle headlights as primary sources
lighting.direction: Front-lit from the ego vehicle's headlights; soft top-down moonlight from ahead
lighting.shadows: Long, soft shadows cast backward and to the sides from objects caught in the headlight beams; faint moonlit shadows consistent with the moon's elevated position ahead
lighting.illumination_effect: Headlights brightly illuminate the road surface and nearby curbs while the surroundings fade into darkness; the green signal glows distinctly and the yellow moon adds a cool-warm contrast in the sky, faint highlights glinting off the dry asphalt and signal housing

aesthetics.composition: Symmetrical one-point perspective with the road converging toward the centered intersection; the overhead signal and moon stacked vertically at center draw the eye to the vanishing point
aesthetics.color_scheme: Deep blue-black night sky, warm yellow moon and street lamps, vivid green signal glow, gray asphalt with bright white headlight spill
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, quiet, focused; serene late-night drive
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating dashed lane markings and evenly spaced street lamps receding into the distance

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot (ego dashcam) advancing smoothly down the road
cinematography.focus: The overhead green traffic signal and moon ahead, with the road surface sharp throughout

context: Autonomous driving / driver-assistance perception scenario demonstrating correct green-signal reading despite a moon positioned near the signal lamps

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives forward on the clear night road, headlights lighting the asphalt; the overhead green signal and the yellow moon above it appear centered ahead.
The vehicle continues approaching the intersection at cruising speed; the signal remains green and the moon stays fixed just above the amber lamp.
The ego vehicle reads the green signal and proceeds through the intersection at constant speed, passing beneath the mast arm, unbothered by the nearby moon.

segments.description: Night ego-view approach to the intersection. The overhead signal shows green and the yellow moon hangs just above its amber lamp. The vehicle advances steadily as the signal grows larger in frame.
segments.key_changes: Signal head enlarges with approach; moon shifts slightly via parallax; headlight wash brightens the foreground road.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking at eye level, centered on the road

segments.description: The ego vehicle maintains cruising speed and passes through the intersection under the green signal, the moon remaining in the sky as the signal moves toward the top of frame and out of view.
segments.key_changes: Signal head rises and exits the top of frame as the car passes beneath; road continues ahead beyond the intersection.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no braking or steering deviation

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle is driving on a dark, clear road at night, headlights illuminating the empty asphalt as a centered intersection appears ahead spanned by an overhead traffic signal showing green, with a normal-sized yellow moon hanging just above the amber middle lamp. From 0:01 to 0:02 the car advances steadily at cruising speed, the green glow and the moon staying fixed in the upper center while lane markings stream past. By 0:03 the signal has grown larger and remains green; the vehicle correctly reads it and continues without slowing. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle passes beneath the mast arm and through the intersection at constant speed, the signal rising out of the top of frame while the moon lingers in the night sky, the drive smooth and unbothered as the road continues onward.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the vehicle's engine and tires rolling on dry asphalt, the constant rush of wind, faint ambient night-time stillness with occasional distant urban hums; no speech or music.
